event_description: The camera surveys a naval base with multiple grey ships, piers, cranes, and harbor infrastructure. Targets are docked or moored while the camera pans and zooms. IR highlights warm dock and ship structures, so thermal brightness must not be mistaken for underway motion.

qa.question: In the early EO segment, which cue pairing is visible for the object?

options.A: the object with ship cluster fixed to piers; cranes and harbor infrastructure nearby
options.B: the object with cranes and harbor infrastructure; ship cluster fixed to piers nearby
options.C: the object with pier, berth, or terminal geometry; fixed harbor background nearby
options.D: the object with fixed harbor background; a wake-like water disturbance nearby

qa.evidence_note: the camera pans and zooms over moored ships and base structures

qa.question: Across the EO scale or angle change, which fixed-state cue stays paired with the object?

options.A: cranes and harbor infrastructure; view scale or angle changes
options.B: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; view scale or angle changes
options.C: fixed harbor background; view scale or angle changes
options.D: ship cluster fixed to piers; view scale or angle changes

qa.evidence_note: the camera pans and zooms over moored ships and base structures

qa.question: In IR, which contrast pairing is visible near the object?

options.A: localized warm terminal or ship structure; pier, berth, or terminal geometry
options.B: localized warm terminal or ship structure; cranes and harbor infrastructure
options.C: localized warm terminal or ship structure; ship cluster fixed to piers
options.D: localized warm terminal or ship structure; fixed harbor background

qa.evidence_note: warm dock and ship structures appear without underway motion

qa.question: Which nearby cue creates a same-scene confusion?

options.A: fixed harbor background; near the object
options.B: ship cluster fixed to piers; near the object
options.C: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; near the object
options.D: cranes and harbor infrastructure; near the object

qa.evidence_note: mistaking thermal brightness in the base for a moving ship

qa.question: Which EO/IR cue pair is visible?

options.A: EO: ship cluster fixed to piers; IR: fixed harbor background
options.B: EO: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; IR: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.C: EO: cranes and harbor infrastructure; IR: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.D: EO: ship cluster fixed to piers; IR: localized warm terminal or ship structure

qa.evidence_note: EO: the camera pans and zooms over moored ships and base structures; IR: warm dock and ship structures appear without underway motion

qa.question: Which cue pairing continues through camera/view change?

options.A: the object: cranes and harbor infrastructure; screen scale or angle changes
options.B: the object: fixed harbor background; screen scale or angle changes
options.C: the object: ship cluster fixed to piers; screen scale or angle changes
options.D: the object: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; screen scale or angle changes

qa.evidence_note: the camera pans and zooms over moored ships and base structures

qa.question: Which EO cue is aligned with the IR contrast cue?

options.A: EO cue: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; IR cue: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.B: EO cue: fixed harbor background; IR cue: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.C: EO cue: ship cluster fixed to piers; IR cue: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.D: EO cue: cranes and harbor infrastructure; IR cue: localized warm terminal or ship structure

qa.evidence_note: EO: the camera pans and zooms over moored ships and base structures; IR: warm dock and ship structures appear without underway motion

qa.question: Which competing cue appears in the cross-modal chain?

options.A: EO/visible cue: cranes and harbor infrastructure; IR/contrast context: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.B: EO/visible cue: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; IR/contrast context: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.C: EO/visible cue: fixed harbor background; IR/contrast context: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.D: EO/visible cue: ship cluster fixed to piers; IR/contrast context: localized warm terminal or ship structure

qa.evidence_note: mistaking thermal brightness in the base for a moving ship

qa.question: When the view changes, which cue is checked against the nearby alternative?

options.A: cranes and harbor infrastructure; ship cluster fixed to piers
options.B: fixed harbor background; ship cluster fixed to piers
options.C: ship cluster fixed to piers; cranes and harbor infrastructure
options.D: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; cranes and harbor infrastructure

qa.evidence_note: the camera pans and zooms over moored ships and base structures

qa.question: Which IR cue pairing appears in this interval?

options.A: localized warm terminal or ship structure; cranes and harbor infrastructure
options.B: localized warm terminal or ship structure; pier, berth, or terminal geometry
options.C: localized warm terminal or ship structure; ship cluster fixed to piers
options.D: localized warm terminal or ship structure; fixed harbor background

qa.evidence_note: warm dock and ship structures appear without underway motion

qa.question: Which combined EO/IR sequence account is visible?

options.A: EO: ship cluster fixed to piers; IR: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.B: EO: fixed harbor background; IR: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.C: EO: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; IR: localized warm terminal or ship structure
options.D: EO: cranes and harbor infrastructure; IR: localized warm terminal or ship structure

qa.evidence_note: EO: the camera pans and zooms over moored ships and base structures; IR: warm dock and ship structures appear without underway motion

qa.question: For the full clip, which cue chain is visible?

options.A: the object: cranes and harbor infrastructure; nearby cue: ship cluster fixed to piers
options.B: the object: pier, berth, or terminal geometry; nearby cue: ship cluster fixed to piers
options.C: the object: ship cluster fixed to piers; nearby cue: cranes and harbor infrastructure
options.D: the object: fixed harbor background; nearby cue: cranes and harbor infrastructure

qa.evidence_note: mistaking thermal brightness in the base for a moving ship

group_scoring_recommendation.C1: Use squared-ratio consistency scoring for the eight-step parallel cue chain.
group_scoring_recommendation.H1: Prefer prefix scoring because the four questions form a cue-chain verdict.

notes.annotation_visibility_warning: Do not export main_event, event_description, answer, option_roles, evidence_note, rationales, or time_reference metadata to model prompts.
notes.design_revision_note: Video-reasoning v15 text-gate repair r2: options are neutral cue-pair choices with same-scene distractors, reducing answerability from wording alone.
acceptance_gates: Run request key-path leakage audit after export.
Run Qwen text-only/no-video baseline before video inference.
Reject samples or templates whose text-only accuracy suggests wording shortcuts.
Keep evidence_note fields internal; they are for annotation audit only.
